arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Dario Essugo possible debut date revealed as 'medical completed' before £18.5m move
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly reach an agreement to sign Sporting Lisbon midfielder Dario Essugo in an £18.5m deal after already securing the signature of Geovany Quenda.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star Moises Caicedo fires Arsenal warning as Cole Palmer message issued
arts.sum: ARSENAL vs CHELSEA: Enzo Maresca's Blues can move within three points of the Premier League title-chasing Gunners if they are to secure victory at the Emirates in Sunday's crunch London derby

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Riccardo Calafiori makes exciting Bukayo Saka claim as comeback edges closer
arts.sum: ARSENAL vs CHELSEA: Gunners left-back Riccardo Calafiori is targeting three points against the Blues but the Italian cannot wait to have star winger Bukayo Saka back in the fold with a Champions League quarter-final showdown with Real Madrid now on the horizon

arts.ttl: Man Utd’s Quenda revenge as Arsenal ‘ADVANCED TALKS’ confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester United could inadvertently get revenge on Chelsea signing Quenda from under their noses as they are in talks with Real Madrid over a transfer for a €100 million star over a deal that could ruin the Blues’ plans. It may only be March but the transfer market is already hotting up thanks to Chelsea going early to sign Geovany Quenda from Sporting.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta makes Myles Lewis-Skelly claim as Bukayo Saka given return timeline
arts.sum: Arsenal face Chelsea on Sunday hoping to solidify second place in the Premier League, with the Premier League title race looking a formality after rivals Liverpool went 15 points clear at the top

arts.ttl: 'Significant financial outlay': David Ornstein says people at Arsenal think 'extraordinary' player is joining them
Chelsea finalise SECOND summer transfer as £18.5m fee agreed and medical 'completed'
arts.sum: Unlike Quenda, who is set to join Chelsea from Sporting in 2026, Essugo will be going straight into Maresca's first-team THIS summer when his loan deal at Las Palmas expires. A defensive midfielder that can also play further forward, Essugo is set to compete with Moises Caicedo, Romeo Lavia and Enzo Fernandez for a place in the Chelsea starting XI next season.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Agree £18.5m Deal to Sign Sporting Midfielder Dario Essugo
arts.sum: Chelsea have agreed an £18.5m deal to sign Sporting Lisbon midfielder Dario Essugo, as per GIVEMESPORT senior correspondent Ben Jacobs.

arts.ttl: Forest score FOUR to move one point behind Arsenal
arts.sum: In Nuno Espirito Santo's 50th Premier League match in charge of Forest, Nikola Milenkovic got the first of three goals in six minutes before half-time with a fierce finish from inside the box. Anthony Elanga scored twice as Nottingham Forest earned a 4-2 home win over Ipswich Town to strengthen their hold on third place, moving one point behind second-placed Arsenal .

arts.ttl: 'The moment I watched them': Mikel Arteta shares what he privately thought about Chelsea in pre-season last year
